Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Mar-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A. Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. 1. Court finds Plaintiff made good faith efforts to notify Defendant of hearing. 2. Request for Judicial Notice/Granted. 3. Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings/Granted/Including costs in the amount of $563.61.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/BZ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Set For Trial On Jun-02-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted
Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CITIBANK, N.A.'s Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Deemed Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is timely filed but unopposed. Request to deem admissions admitted is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)
